title: Create New Project
subtitle: Set up your brand profile for AI visibility optimization

brandBasics.title: Brand Basics
brandBasics.description: Start by telling us about your brand. This information helps AI engines understand and represent your brand accurately.
brandBasics.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what your brand does, who you serve, and what makes you unique...
brandBasics.audiencePlaceholder: e.g. Small business owners, Enterprise CTOs, Marketing teams...
brandBasics.uspPlaceholder: Add a key differentiator and press Enter...
brandBasics.uspHint: Press Enter to add each point
brandBasics.autofillHint: AI will analyze your website and fill in the fields below

crawlWebsite.title: Crawl Website
crawlWebsite.description: We'll crawl your website to import existing content and build your knowledge base automatically.
crawlWebsite.noEntriesExtracted: Pages were crawled but no structured knowledge could be extracted. You can add entries manually in the Knowledge Pack.
crawlWebsite.pagesPreviewDescription: Review the pages the crawler reached and the content we pulled from each one.
crawlWebsite.knowledgePreviewDescription: This is the knowledge currently available to power product suggestions and downstream AI analysis.
crawlWebsite.skipHint: You can skip this step and add content manually later.

products.title: Products & Services
products.description: Add your products or services so AI engines can accurately describe your offerings.
products.suggestHint: Use your crawled website knowledge to draft product and service suggestions for review before saving.
products.suggestNoKnowledge: Crawl the website first to generate product suggestions from real brand knowledge.
products.suggestNoExtractedKnowledge: We crawled pages, but no usable knowledge has been extracted yet. Review the crawl output or crawl more relevant pages first.
products.suggestFailed: Could not generate product suggestions right now.
products.noSuggestionsFound: No distinct product suggestions were found from the current crawl.
products.suggestionsDescription: Review each suggestion before adding it to your project.
products.descriptionPlaceholder: What does this product or service do?
products.featuresPlaceholder: Add a feature and press Enter...
products.emptyState: No products added yet. Add your first product or service.
products.skipHint: You can add products later from the project settings.

competitors.title: Competitors
competitors.description: Identifying your competitors helps us track share-of-voice and differentiate your brand in AI responses.
competitors.suggestHint: Search the web for likely competitors, then review the suggestions before adding them.
competitors.suggestPrerequisite: Finish brand setup first so we know what kind of competitors to look for.
competitors.suggestUnavailable: Competitor discovery is not configured yet.
competitors.suggestFailed: Could not generate competitor suggestions right now.
competitors.noSuggestionsFound: No clear competitor suggestions were found yet.
competitors.suggestionsDescription: These are draft suggestions from Tavily search plus AI summarization.
competitors.notesPlaceholder: How do they compete with you?
competitors.emptyState: No competitors added yet. Add your key competitors.
competitors.skipHint: You can add competitors later from the project settings.

uploadFiles.title: Upload Files
uploadFiles.description: Upload documents, presentations, or data sheets to enrich your knowledge base.
uploadFiles.dropzone: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
uploadFiles.dropzoneHint: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, CSV, and XLSX (max 10MB each)
uploadFiles.skipHint: You can upload files later from the project settings.

reviewQuestions.title: Review Generated Queries
reviewQuestions.description: These queries will be run against AI engines to measure your brand's visibility. Edit or remove any that don't fit.
reviewQuestions.generating: Generating queries based on your brand profile...
reviewQuestions.generateFailed: Could not generate queries. Try again.
reviewQuestions.minWarning: At least 3 queries are recommended for meaningful results.
reviewQuestions.emptyState: No queries generated. Click regenerate to try again.
reviewQuestions.skipHint: You can manage queries later from the project's query management page.

review.title: Review & Launch
review.description: Review your project setup before launching. You can always edit these details later.
review.starterRunDescription: We can create your first runnable query set now, generate starter prompts, approve them, and launch runs on the engines you choose.
review.starterQuerySetSummary: Create one query set named "Starter Visibility Queries" if your project does not have one yet.
review.starterQueryGenerationSummary: Generate 10 starter visibility queries from your current brand context.
review.starterAutoApproveSummary: Auto-approve the generated queries so they can run immediately.
review.enginesHint: All active engines are selected by default. You can narrow the first run if needed.
review.noActiveEngines: No active engines are configured yet. Activate at least one engine before starting the first run.
review.selectAtLeastOneEngine: Select at least one engine to start the first run.
review.sampleCountHint: We recommend starting with 2 samples per engine for a fast first signal.
review.firstRunFailed: We couldn't start the first run. Review the setup and try again.
review.finishLaterFailed: We couldn't finish setup right now. Try again in a moment.
review.firstRunPartial: {{created}} runs were created, but {{failed}} engine launches failed.
review.nextStepsDescription: You will land on the project dashboard. The next setup flow is:
review.nextStepsCreateSet: Open Query Management and create your first query set.
review.nextStepsAddQueries: Generate or add queries, then review what should be tracked.
review.nextStepsRun: Start a run to collect answers and visibility data.

editWizard.title: Edit Knowledge Pack
editWizard.subtitle: Update your brand profile, knowledge, products, and competitors
